title: Masterplast Vapour Rub - For Clear, Cool Breathing, Ready To Use 100g
features: SOOTHING & REVIVING: Masterplast Vapour Rub helps to soothe and revive your senses, making it easier to go about daily activities. Whether at work or home, a little rub can make a big difference!
BREATHE EASY: This chest rub features menthol, and eucalyptus oil, creating a refreshing formula for cool, clear breathing.
CONVENIENT SIZE: Designed for on-the-go relief, this vapour rub comes in a handy tub that fits easily into a handbag or pocket. It’s perfect for travel!

WINTER ESSENTIAL: Store Masterplast Vapour Rub, in a cool dry place, out of the reach of children. For external use only. Do not apply vapour rub to broken skin. Do not use on the face or in nostrils. Do not swallow.

SOOTHING APPLICATION: Applying the rub is simple and effective—just massage a small amount onto your chest, throat, or back. This gentle massage not only soothes the skin but also helps you to relax to ease breathing discomfort. Use it after a long day or before bedtime for a restful night.
STEAM INHALATION : Masterplast Vapour Rub, suitable for steam inhalation. Always follow pack directions, add to warm, never boiling water
description: Product Description Masterplast Vapour Rub, for clear cool breathing. Apply to back or chest to relieve sinus and nasal congestion. Suitable for steam inhalation. Always follow pack directions, add to warm, never boiling water to release a soothing menthol & eucalyptus vapour to relieve nasal congestion for easier breathing. Ready to use, resealable vapour rub, 100g Ingredients Petrolatum, Paraffinum Liquidum, Menthol, Camphor, Eucalyptus Globulus Oil, Cedrus Atlantica Oil, Myristica Fragrans Extract, Thymol, Limonene, Linalool Directions Rub a small amount onto chest, throat and back. Do not cover with bandages or tight clothing. Repeat up to 3 times daily. Safety Warning Keep out of sight and reach of children. Not suitable for children under 8 years old. For external use only. Avoid direct contact with eyes. Do not place in nostrils. Do not apply on wounds and damaged skin. Do not cover with bandages. Do not apply immediately after a bath. Do not add to water or any container where heating water, this may cause splattering and result in burns. Do not microwave. Manufacturer Contact Information Master Plast Vapour Rub 100g See more
